channel.title: veganuary TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from veganuary

item.title: Same viral japanese cheesecake recipe, just vegan! This is such an easy & simply recipe, and it's just as easy to turn it plant-based! Will you be trying this out? Save this video, and let us know how your cheesecake turns out! #japanesecheesecake #veganr
item.description: Same viral japanese cheesecake recipe, just vegan! This is such an easy & simply recipe, and it's just as easy to turn it plant-based! Will you be trying this out? Save this video, and let us know how your cheesecake turns out! #japanesecheesecake #veganr

item.title: They get EPA and DHA from algae. We can skip the middleman and get the same essential fatty acids directly from cultivated micro-algae, without harming oceans or animals. 1. Algae-based supplements provide the same EPA & DHA as fish oil. 2. Widely availab
item.description: They get EPA and DHA from algae. We can skip the middleman and get the same essential fatty acids directly from cultivated micro-algae, without harming oceans or animals. 1. Algae-based supplements provide the same EPA & DHA as fish oil. 2. Widely availab

item.title: NYC is the place to be for Veganuary! 🗽 Swipe to see some of the restaurants participating across the city, and check out the link in our bio for the full map of participating restaurants around NYC and DC 👀🙌 🍽️ Avant Garden is offering a five-course ta
item.description: NYC is the place to be for Veganuary! 🗽 Swipe to see some of the restaurants participating across the city, and check out the link in our bio for the full map of participating restaurants around NYC and DC 👀🙌   🍽️ Avant Garden is offering a five-course ta

item.title: Here are just a few of the exciting new vegan products that have launched just in time for Veganuary! 💚 What's your favourite new product you've tried this Veganuary? 👇 #veganfooduk #newveganfood #veganuk #veganaldi #veganuary @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco
item.description: Here are just a few of the exciting new vegan products that have launched just in time for Veganuary! 💚 What's your favourite new product you've tried this Veganuary? 👇 #veganfooduk #newveganfood #veganuk #veganaldi #veganuary @Waitrose & Partners @Tesco

item.title: There are so many plant-based replacements for your favourite foods, you won't miss a thing! If you’d like some vegan recipe inspiration, our celebrity cookbook and other resources, click the link in our bio! 🌱 #vegan #veganuary2026 #veganuary
item.description: There are so many plant-based replacements for your favourite foods, you won't miss a thing! If you’d like some vegan recipe inspiration, our celebrity cookbook and other resources, click the link in our bio! 🌱 #vegan #veganuary2026 #veganuary

item.title: Same you. Just a new way to show your love for animals. 🐶🐷 So many of us share our lives with animals, and choosing plant-based is just a way of extending that kindness to our plates. From pups to pigs, all animals deserve to feel loved this Veganuary. 💚
item.description: Same you. Just a new way to show your love for animals. 🐶🐷 So many of us share our lives with animals, and choosing plant-based is just a way of extending that kindness to our plates. From pups to pigs, all animals deserve to feel loved this Veganuary. 💚

item.title: Did you know beef production requires an extortionate amount of resources to produce a relatively small amount of food? Plant-based options use far fewer resources, which makes them better for the planet and kinder to animals. It's not too late to try veg
item.description: Did you know beef production requires an extortionate amount of resources to produce a relatively small amount of food? Plant-based options use far fewer resources, which makes them better for the planet and kinder to animals. It's not too late to try veg

item.title: Big or small, every win counts 🥳 This Veganuary, you tried new things, stepped out of your comfort zone, and maybe even inspired someone else to give vegan food a go, and that deserves celebrating 🎂 And wins don’t stop here. We can keep achieving vegan vi
item.description: Big or small, every win counts 🥳 This Veganuary, you tried new things, stepped out of your comfort zone, and maybe even inspired someone else to give vegan food a go, and that deserves celebrating 🎂 And wins don’t stop here. We can keep achieving vegan vi

item.title: AD New year, same me! 🌱🍔 Trying plant-based doesn’t always mean a total reinvention, and NotCo products are proof of that! You can still have your favorite delicious comfort foods, just with plant-based ingredients instead. Follow @notcous and keep an
item.description: AD New year, same me! 🌱🍔  Trying plant-based doesn’t always mean a total reinvention, and NotCo products are proof of that! You can still have your favorite delicious comfort foods, just with plant-based ingredients instead.   Follow @notcous and keep an

item.title: Four breakfasts I make on repeat for cold, dark winter mornings. ⬇️ If your current February breakfast strategy is "staring at the kettle until it boils," these four breakfasts are for you. They transition perfectly from Veganuary into the rest of the yea
item.description: Four breakfasts I make on repeat for cold, dark winter mornings. ⬇️ If your current February breakfast strategy is "staring at the kettle until it boils," these four breakfasts are for you. They transition perfectly from Veganuary into the rest of the yea

item.title: Game day is all about the food (and football, obviously). Here are some plant-based game day eats for your big game party. 🏈🌱 What’s your go-to vegan game day snack? Comment below! 👇🏟️ #vegan #gameday #plantbased #football #Veganuary
item.description: Game day is all about the food (and football, obviously). Here are some plant-based game day eats for your big game party. 🏈🌱 What’s your go-to vegan game day snack? Comment below! 👇🏟️ #vegan #gameday #plantbased #football #Veganuary

item.title: New year, same movie lover 🎬🍿 Comment your favorite vegan movie theater snack below 👇 #vegan #AMC #movies #plantbased #veganuary
item.description: New year, same movie lover 🎬🍿 Comment your favorite vegan movie theater snack below 👇 #vegan #AMC #movies #plantbased #veganuary

item.title: Vegan Valentine’s Dinner: Trader Joe’s Edition 💖🌱 What are you eating for Valentine’s Day? Comment below! 👇 #vegan #ValentinesDay #TraderJoes #Veganuary
item.description: Vegan Valentine’s Dinner: Trader Joe’s Edition 💖🌱 What are you eating for Valentine’s Day? Comment below! 👇 #vegan #ValentinesDay #TraderJoes #Veganuary

item.title: Love isn't just for humans! This valentine's day, let's show our compassion to all animals 💚 If you're ready to start your vegan journey today, click the link in our bio for access to free resources, our celebrity cookbook, meal plans and more. 🌱 🎥: @Rosi
item.description: Love isn't just for humans! This valentine's day, let's show our compassion to all animals 💚 If you're ready to start your vegan journey today, click the link in our bio for access to free resources, our celebrity cookbook, meal plans and more. 🌱 🎥: @Rosi

item.title: No eggs? No dairy? No problem! From aquafaba egg replacement and vegan pancake shaker mixes, to toppings like vegan cheese and whipped cream, Pancake Day is super easy as a vegan! Whether you've been trying vegan with us since January, or are just now fin
item.description: No eggs? No dairy? No problem! From aquafaba egg replacement and vegan pancake shaker mixes, to toppings like vegan cheese and whipped cream, Pancake Day is super easy as a vegan! Whether you've been trying vegan with us since January, or are just now fin

item.title: Oh, and guess what? All of these swaps and recommendations are plant-based! 🌱 Want one more tip? Leaving skins on fruit and vegetables can help boost fibre, so eat the kiwi as it is and don't peel your sweet potato! 🥝🍠 SAVE this for the next time you writ
item.description: Oh, and guess what? All of these swaps and recommendations are plant-based! 🌱 Want one more tip? Leaving skins on fruit and vegetables can help boost fibre, so eat the kiwi as it is and don't peel your sweet potato! 🥝🍠 SAVE this for the next time you writ

item.title: Here’s another high-protein vegan what I eat in a day - but this time, Winter Comfort Food Edition! 💪🌱 Comment below which recipe you want to recreate! 🥯 #vegan #protein #bagels #veganuary
item.description: Here’s another high-protein vegan what I eat in a day - but this time, Winter Comfort Food Edition! 💪🌱 Comment below which recipe you want to recreate! 🥯 #vegan #protein #bagels #veganuary

item.title: New plate, same animal lover. 🐈‍⬛🐖🐕🐄 From pre-vegan days to post-Veganuary, our love for all animals has only grown stronger because trying vegan isn't about changing who you are. It's about extending compassion to all animals, not just the ones on our co
item.description: New plate, same animal lover. 🐈‍⬛🐖🐕🐄 From pre-vegan days to post-Veganuary, our love for all animals has only grown stronger because trying vegan isn't about changing who you are. It's about extending compassion to all animals, not just the ones on our co

item.title: 3 tofu recipes. 3 types of tofu. Silken, firm, super-firm. 🤍 Have you learned a new way to cook tofu while trying vegan with us? Comment below👇 #vegan #tofu #plantbasedrecipe #Veganuary
item.description: 3 tofu recipes. 3 types of tofu. Silken, firm, super-firm. 🤍 Have you learned a new way to cook tofu while trying vegan with us? Comment below👇 #vegan #tofu #plantbasedrecipe #Veganuary

item.title: Sheep are beautiful animals that are very sensitive 💚 They have an excellent memory and can recognise and remember faces! Comment a 🐑 below if you agree we should show more love to these under-appreciated animals 👇 @The Surge Sanctuary #sheep #rescueanim
item.description: Sheep are beautiful animals that are very sensitive 💚 They have an excellent memory and can recognise and remember faces! Comment a 🐑 below if you agree we should show more love to these under-appreciated animals 👇 @The Surge Sanctuary #sheep #rescueanim

item.title: Come with me to try the vegan options at Olive Garden (and yes… the breadsticks are vegan) 🍝😌 What's your favorite vegan Italian dish? Comment below! 👇 #vegan #OliveGarden #pasta #Veganuary
item.description: Come with me to try the vegan options at Olive Garden (and yes… the breadsticks are vegan) 🍝😌 What's your favorite vegan Italian dish? Comment below! 👇 #vegan #OliveGarden #pasta #Veganuary

item.title: They are talking to each other, so maybe it’s time we start listening. 🐔 🐣 A mother’s voice is the first thing a chick ever knows. Let’s respect their bond by leaving them off our plate and choosing plant-based alternatives. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if
item.description: They are talking to each other, so maybe it’s time we start listening. 🐔 🐣 A mother’s voice is the first thing a chick ever knows. Let’s respect their bond by leaving them off our plate and choosing plant-based alternatives. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if

item.title: From pistachio crunch to salted popcorn, UK supermarkets have some great plant-based Easter eggs and treats this year, making it the perfect time to make the swap and try the vegan option! 🌱 Which would you choose? Let us know! 👇 #EasterEgg #eastereggs #v
item.description: From pistachio crunch to salted popcorn, UK supermarkets have some great plant-based Easter eggs and treats this year, making it the perfect time to make the swap and try the vegan option! 🌱 Which would you choose? Let us know! 👇 #EasterEgg #eastereggs #v

item.title: We Asked, You Answered: Our Community’s Holy Grail Meat Alternatives 📣 When it comes to vegan food, the real experts are the ones cooking it every night. So, we asked our community what meat alternatives actually end up in their shopping basket, and the r
item.description: We Asked, You Answered: Our Community’s Holy Grail Meat Alternatives 📣 When it comes to vegan food, the real experts are the ones cooking it every night. So, we asked our community what meat alternatives actually end up in their shopping basket, and the r

item.title: We love affordable vegan options 😊🌱 The vegan finds at Dollar General are actually solid! Which one surprised you the most? Comment below 👇 #vegan #DollarGeneral #budget #Veganuary
item.description: We love affordable vegan options 😊🌱 The vegan finds at Dollar General are actually solid! Which one surprised you the most? Comment below 👇 #vegan #DollarGeneral #budget #Veganuary

item.title: When you can rest easy because you are safe, loved, and free. 🐑 Every animal deserves to be treated as an individual and not an ingredient. Let's make animals' dreams come true by choosing plant-based alternatives instead. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if y
item.description: When you can rest easy because you are safe, loved, and free. 🐑 Every animal deserves to be treated as an individual and not an ingredient. Let's make animals' dreams come true by choosing plant-based alternatives instead. 🌱 Leave a 💚 in the comments if y

item.title: All mothers should be free to love and protect their babies. 🐮❤️ In the dairy industry, motherhood is a cycle of loss. After seven pregnancies, Jackie the cow was rescued and finally able to keep her baby and even opened her heart to adopt another. This s
item.description: All mothers should be free to love and protect their babies. 🐮❤️ In the dairy industry, motherhood is a cycle of loss. After seven pregnancies, Jackie the cow was rescued and finally able to keep her baby and even opened her heart to adopt another. This s

item.title: The team behind England's first plant-based hotel, Beck Hall Hotel, has announced that they will be opening Wales’ first fully vegan hotel! Ffarm Hall Hotel, located in North Wales, will be opening in May 2026 and is taking bookings now! 💚 SHARE this with
item.description: The team behind England's first plant-based hotel, Beck Hall Hotel, has announced that they will be opening Wales’ first fully vegan hotel! Ffarm Hall Hotel, located in North Wales, will be opening in May 2026 and is taking bookings now! 💚 SHARE this with

item.title: Trying the vegan options at Blaze Pizza! 🍕 What’s your favorite pizza topping? Comment below! 👇 #pizza #vegan #dairyfree #Veganuary
item.description: Trying the vegan options at Blaze Pizza! 🍕 What’s your favorite pizza topping? Comment below! 👇 #pizza #vegan #dairyfree #Veganuary

item.title: No plant milk upcharge = happiness 😌🌱 What's your go-to dairy-free milk? Comment below 👇 #vegan #coffee #dairyfree #oatmilk #Veganuary
